title: manulea rubra
intro: Manulea rubra, also known as the Red Manulea, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the world. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Manulea rubra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional medicine.
